## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo build` succeeds
- [ ] `cargo test --lib --release` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` has no new warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt` has been run
- [ ] Changes are backward-compatible (or marked as breaking)
